item.title: JACK & JONES Jjiglenn Jjicon JJ 357 50sps Noos Vaqueros Slim Azul Blue Denim Blue Denim 32W / 30L para Hombre

Slim fit jeans made of cotton with a low stretch. 🛒 Aquí!!!
